title: Visual & Stuff
description: A modpack inspired by the "Action`s & Staff" datapack and adapted for Java
body:
I've adapted an "Actions & Stuff" datapack for the Java version of the game so you can enjoy Minecraft.

The modpack changes the game's visual appearance, animations, and adds 3D sounds.
I also optimized the build so that almost everyone could afford it.

All mods are client-side, meaning you can enjoy the modpack not only in your own world, but also on any other Vanilla servers.

*P.S. The gallery will explain the order I recommend installing the resource packs in to ensure everything works as intended.*
